name: slide-mcp-server
description: Manage Slide backup appliances, agents, snapshots, restores, and DR networks from Claude.
long_description:
Slide MCP Server connects Claude Desktop directly to your Slide account. Once installed, Claude can list and manage every backup device and agent, browse snapshots, drive file/image/push restores, spin up disaster-recovery VMs, configure DR networks (including device-level VLANs and per-device network settings), tune backup schedules and retention, pause/resume backups and alerts, run service verification on backup snapshots, and pull live documentation from docs.slide.tech.

This bundle includes signed and notarized binaries for macOS (Apple Silicon + Intel), Linux (amd64 + arm64), and Windows (amd64); the right binary is launched automatically for your machine.

Generate an API token at console.slide.tech under My Settings -> API Tokens. The token is stored by Claude Desktop and only sent to the slide-mcp-server process; it is never written into any project file.

api_key.title: Slide API Token
api_key.description: Generate at console.slide.tech under My Settings -> API Tokens. The token gives full access to your Slide account; it is stored by Claude Desktop and only forwarded to the slide-mcp-server process at launch.

tools_mode.title: Tool permissions
tools_mode.description: reporting (read-only), restores (read + restore/VM/network management), full-safe (everything except dangerous ops, default), full (unrestricted including delete operations).
